description_long: This is a standard-sized aluminum beer can with a matte metallic silver upper half and a dark, almost black, lower half separated by a thin gold band. The can features a detailed topographic map pattern across the silver area, giving it a rugged, outdoorsy aesthetic. Prominent on the front is a compass rose and mountain illustration, along with bold, modern typography indicating the beer's type and alcohol content. The pull tab is black and sits atop a slightly recessed, circular lid. Fine print and a barcode are visible on the back, while the overall surface appears smooth with a slight sheen. The can is cylindrical, lightweight, and designed for single-use beverage containment.
description: A matte silver and black aluminum beer can with a topographic map design, compass illustration, and bold modern text. The can features a black pull tab and a gold accent band.
description_view_0: The can's front shows the compass and mountain illustration, bold text, and the gold accent band, with the pull tab partially open.
description_view_1: The back of the can displays fine print and the continuation of the topographic map design, with the pull tab seen from above.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the barcode and more of the map pattern, with the pull tab open and the can's metallic sheen visible.
description_view_3: The front label is fully visible, showing the compass, mountain, and main product information, with the pull tab closed and centered.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a grayscale topographic map pattern, a compass rose, and a mountain illustration, accented by a gold band. Typography is bold and modern, with clear product details and a minimalistic, outdoors-inspired style.
